name: Pushwoosh
description: Pushwoosh — Cross-platform push notification service supporting iOS, Android, and web with segmentation, automation, and analytics.

seo.title: Pushwoosh — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Pushwoosh: Pushwoosh — Cross-platform push notification service supporting iOS, Android, and web with segmentation, automation, and analytics.

when_to_use: Cross-platform push notifications across iOS, Android, and web
Segmented automation for mobile app user retention
In-app messaging and push combined campaigns

pros: Cross-platform support including web and mobile
Segmentation with behavior and geo filters
Has been in market long enough to be stable
cons: UI feels dated versus Braze or CleverTap
review.verdict: Capable cross-platform push, but procurement and geopolitics make it hard to recommend today.
review.best_for: Teams already running Pushwoosh and happy with it
review.not_for: New projects with strict vendor sourcing requirements

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
